title: Add error when accessing a non-static class field from a static function

features.name: non-static member access from static class method
features.description: Code should include a class with a static method that accesses a non-static class member or 'this' handle
features.snippet: class C; int x; static function void foo(); x = 1; endfunction endclass

features.name: this handle access from static class method
features.description: Code should include a class with a static method that references the 'this' handle
features.snippet: class C; int x; static function void foo(); this.x = 1; endfunction endclass
